LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, AFT LOCAL 61, PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. THE JUDGE STATED FOR THE RECORD THAT HE WOULD SEEK TO RECUSE HIMSELF AS HIS WIFE IS EMPLOYED BY SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT - LOWELL HIGH SCHOOL. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, AFT LOCAL 61, Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus.
RULING: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. The Judge stated for the record that he would seek to recuse himself as his wife is employed by San Francisco Unified School District - Lowell High School. Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay.
